data.title: Xiabuxiabu Announces Board and Audit Committee Changes
data.description:
Xiabuxiabu Catering Management (China) Holdings Co., Ltd. ( (HK:0520) ) has issued an announcement.

Xiabuxiabu Catering Management (China) Holdings Co., Ltd. announced changes in its board of directors and audit committee effective April 15, 2025. Ms. Li Jie will resign as a non-executive director and member of the audit committee, while Mr. Feng Hui-Huang and Mr. Huang Cheng-Chung have been appointed as executive director and independent non-executive director respectively. These changes are expected to bring new perspectives and expertise to the company’s leadership, potentially impacting its strategic direction and operational efficiency.

More about Xiabuxiabu Catering Management (China) Holdings Co., Ltd.

Xiabuxiabu Catering Management (China) Holdings Co., Ltd. is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, primarily engaged in the catering industry. The company, along with its subsidiaries, is involved in the management and operation of restaurants, with a focus on providing quality dining experiences.

data.title: Clean Energy Transition Inc. Advances Aurora Nickel Project with Updated Resource Estimate
data.description:
Rogue Resources ( (TSE:TRAN) ) has shared an update.

Clean Energy Transition Inc. has filed an independent Technical Report for the Aurora Nickel Project, supporting an updated Mineral Resource Estimate (MRE) with significant nickel resources. The project, located near Timmins, Ontario, presents a low-carbon nickel opportunity, with the potential to supply enough nickel for over 705,000 electric vehicles, highlighting its strategic importance in the energy transition.

More about Rogue Resources

Clean Energy Transition Inc. is focused on generating positive cash flow through the energy transition. The company operates a Quartz division advancing silica/Quartz projects and a Critical Minerals division, which includes the Aurora Nickel Project in Ontario. They aim to supply the growing North American demand for low-carbon nickel and explore additional opportunities across the energy transition.

Average Trading Volume: 18,371

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: C$1.46M

data.title: Hestia Insight Delays 10-Q Filing Due to Review Needs
data.description:
Hestia Insight ( (HSTA) ) has released a notification of late filing.

Hestia Insight Inc. has announced a delay in filing its Form 10-Q (Quarter Report) for the financial period ending February 28, 2025. The primary reason for the delay is the need for additional time to compile and review the necessary information to ensure adequate disclosure. The company anticipates filing the report within five calendar days following the original due date. Despite the delay, Hestia Insight does not expect any significant changes in its financial results compared to the same period last year. The company is actively working to comply with all regulatory requirements, as confirmed by CEO Edward Lee’s signature on the notification.

More about Hestia Insight

data.title: EuroGroup Laminations Releases Key Documents Ahead of Shareholders’ Meeting
data.description:
An update from EuroGroup Laminations S.p.A ( (IT:EGLA) ) is now available.

EuroGroup Laminations S.p.A. has announced the availability of key documents for its upcoming Ordinary Shareholders’ Meeting on May 5, 2025. These documents, which include the 2024 Annual Integrated Report, Corporate Governance and Ownership Structure Report, and the 2025 Remuneration Policy Report, are accessible to the public through various platforms. This announcement underscores the company’s commitment to transparency and governance, potentially impacting its stakeholder relations and reinforcing its market position.

More about EuroGroup Laminations S.p.A

EuroGroup Laminations S.p.A. is a global leader in the design, production, and distribution of stators and rotors for electric motors and generators. The company operates through two main business units: E-mobility solutions, which focuses on electric motor cores for vehicle traction and various automotive applications, and Home and Industrial solutions, which caters to industrial applications, home automation, HVAC equipment, wind energy, logistics, and pumps. The company is also involved in the transformer sector. Headquartered in Baranzate, Italy, EuroGroup Laminations achieved revenues of approximately 869 million euros in 2024 and employs around 3,800 people across 15 production plants worldwide.

YTD Price Performance: -14.80%

Average Trading Volume: 561,035

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: €387.8M

data.description:

Defense Metals Corp. announced the issuance of 640,097 common shares to satisfy interest payments on secured convertible notes, amounting to C$98,632.55. This move, subject to TSX Venture Exchange approval, reflects the company’s strategic financial management and could impact its market positioning by potentially enhancing liquidity and shareholder value.

data.title: BluSky AI Rebrands to Focus on AI Innovations
data.description:
BluSky AI ( (BSAI) ) has shared an update.

On April 8, 2025, BluSky AI Inc. announced a strategic rebranding from its former name, Inception Mining Inc., reflecting a shift from traditional mining to AI data center innovations. This rebranding, including a new logo and digital presence, aligns with the company’s focus on rapidly deployable AI modular compute infrastructure to address the AI compute needs and supply shortages. The company aims to accelerate the time to market for AI computing solutions compared to traditional HPC data centers. BluSky AI’s modular data centers offer rapid deployment, scalability, and powered land assets, positioning the company as a key player in the evolving AI industry, allowing stakeholders to benefit from AI’s growth without the risks associated with individual companies.

More about BluSky AI

BluSky AI Inc., headquartered in Salt Lake City, Utah, is a modular data center company dedicated to providing innovative and sustainable infrastructure solutions that power the AI revolution. The company is focused on revolutionizing the AI compute landscape by addressing the immediate global AI supply shortage with cutting-edge, turnkey modular solutions across multiple locations.

data.title: Health In Tech Unveils AI-Driven Healthcare Solutions
data.description:
The latest update is out from Health In Tech, Inc. Class A ( (HIT) ).

On April 14, 2025, Health In Tech, Inc. prepared an investor presentation to be presented at conferences and meetings. The presentation highlights the company’s innovative approach to healthcare through AI-powered platforms that automate medical underwriting and broker quoting, significantly reducing the time to generate bindable quotes. This advancement is expected to enhance operational efficiency, lower costs, and improve accessibility and transparency in the healthcare market, particularly benefiting small businesses by offering competitive and customizable health plans.

Spark’s Take on HIT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, HIT is a Neutral.

Health In Tech, Inc. has demonstrated strong financial growth and strategic initiatives, though operational inefficiencies and high valuation pose risks. The company’s strategic investments, leadership expansion, and technological advancements are poised to support future growth. However, current technical indicators suggest caution in the short term.

To see Spark’s full report on HIT stock, click here.

More about Health In Tech, Inc. Class A

Health In Tech, Inc. is an insurance technology platform focused on simplifying healthcare industry processes through vertical integration, automation, and process streamlining. The company offers a marketplace for insurance companies to list stop-loss policies, enabling brokers to quickly obtain bindable quotes and sell to small businesses. Their technology allows for medical underwriting and producing bindable quotes within approximately two minutes, offering customizable solutions for health benefits, vendors, claims, and network services.

data.title: Auckland Airport Reports Decline in March Passenger Movements
data.description:
Auckland International Airport Limited ( (ACKDF) ) has shared an update.

In March 2025, Auckland International Airport experienced a 4% decrease in international passenger movements compared to the previous year, with a notable reduction in seat capacity on USA routes due to service suspensions and route exits by major airlines. Despite these challenges, load factors on these routes improved. Domestic passenger movements also saw a 3% decline, while Queenstown Airport’s international passenger numbers remained stable. These changes reflect broader trends in passenger travel and airline capacity adjustments, impacting the airport’s operations and stakeholder interests.

More about Auckland International Airport Limited

Auckland International Airport Limited (AIAL) operates in the aviation industry, primarily focusing on managing and operating Auckland Airport, which is a key international gateway in New Zealand. The company provides services related to passenger and aircraft movements, and its market focus includes both international and domestic travel.

Average Trading Volume: 979

data.title: Electra Battery Materials Closes $3.5M Private Placement to Boost Refinery Project
data.description:
The latest update is out from Electra Battery Materials Corp ( (TSE:ELBM) ).

Electra Battery Materials Corporation announced the closing of its oversubscribed private placement, raising approximately $3.5 million. The funds will be used to advance the company’s refinery project in Temiskaming Shores, Ontario, and for general corporate purposes. The offering involved key company executives and directors, constituting a related party transaction. The transaction did not require formal valuation or minority shareholder approval due to its size relative to the company’s market capitalization. The offering is subject to final approval by the TSX Venture Exchange.

Spark’s Take on TSE:ELBM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:ELBM is a Underperform.

Electra Battery Materials Corp is struggling financially with no revenue and high losses, contributing to a low overall score. Technical indicators confirm a bearish trend, while valuation concerns due to negative earnings further weigh on the stock. The recent corporate event, although positive, does not yet offset these challenges.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:ELBM stock, click here.

More about Electra Battery Materials Corp

Electra Battery Materials Corporation is a leader in advancing North America’s critical minerals supply chain for lithium-ion batteries. The company is focused on developing North America’s only cobalt sulfate refinery and aims to reduce reliance on foreign supply chains by onshoring critical minerals refining. Electra’s strategy includes nickel refining, battery recycling, and exploring opportunities for cobalt and nickel sulfate production in North America.

Average Trading Volume: 31,185
